title: Molten Briny Dutch Mushrooms Bowl
description: A cozy Dutch dish featuring shiitake mushrooms in a rich, emulsified sauce.
instructions: In a large earthenware bowl, melt the butter in the oven at 180°C for 5 minutes, or until bubbly.
Sprinkle the flour over the butter and cook for a further 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly pour in the milk and brine, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens.
Add the thyme, garlic powder, and white pepper, and stir to combine.
Arrange the mushrooms on top of the sauce and transfer the bowl to the oven.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the bowl from the oven and stir in the cream.
Return the bowl to the oven and bake for a further 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce is smooth and emulsified.
Remove the bowl from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the mushrooms and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
